en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?
B: I want to buy a cup.
A: Hello, what do you want to buy?
B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: ko manazang so koppo, ya miyan?
en: A: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?
B: Yes, how many do you want to buy?
A: Do you sell betel nut?
B: No, we don't sell betel nut.
A: I want to buy rice.
B: How many packs do you want to buy?
A: Give me three packs.
A: I want to buy sweet potatoes.

ab: da na nimimin o wakey a nisazangan.
en: B: All the sweet potatoes are sold out.
A: I want to buy two bottles of oil.

ab: yasa ka tagow rana o aneng a yamavezed.
en: B: We only have one bottle left.
A: Go buy me eggs.
B: How many do you want to buy?
A: How many eggs do you want to buy?
B: I want to buy six.

ab: ko manazang so adoa bedbed a nappa.
en: A: I want to buy two handfuls of cabbage.

ab: yatlo a bedbed rana o yamapanpan.to mo na mimina apen.
en: B: There are three left, all for you!

ab: yapira o ngina no mojis ya?
en: A: How much is this bag of rice?
B: $200 for a pack.

ab: yasa neykatlo a ngarnan, adoa ngarnan am.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.
B: Thank you.

ab: ya mian jia so yalima so ipakapoo.
en: A: Here's $95.

ab: to ko na nganeta asa poo o sazangan ko.
en: B: I'll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.
A:All $510.

ab: apiya ka alima na poo no itoro ko?
en: B: Count me in for $500, okay?

ab: yatey masingat oya, apiya pahephepan mo?
ch: A:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: It's too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ab: taosya, ta yapereh rana nginginan sya.
ch: B:不行，這個已經很便宜了。
en: B: No, this is already very cheap.

ab: ko manazang so yasakekeh a okasi.
en: A: I want this bag of candy.

ab: yatlo a nganan o ngina no okasi.yapa mian so mo ikakza ya sazangan?
ch: B:這糖果30元，還需要別的東西嗎?
en: B: $30 for this candy, anything else you need?
